title: Dang Bireley's and the Young Gangsters
original_title: 2499 อันธพาลครองเมือง
overview: Dang Bireley, a young man who became famous in Phra Nakorn as a Gangster. Everything swung his way until one of Thailand's many coups d'etat imposed martial law and drove the city's gangsters up-country.
